title: The CLL comorbidity index in a population-based cohort: a tool for clinical care and research.
author: Rotbain EC Gordon MJ Vainer N Frederiksen H Hjalgrim H Danilov AV Niemann CU
content: S-EPMC9043948 PMC9043948 The CLL comorbidity index in a population-based cohort: a tool for clinical care and research. The chronic lymphocytic leukemia comorbidity index (CLL-CI) is an efficient, CLL-specific tool derived from the Cumulative Illness Rating Scale. The CLL-CI is based
